title: stelis panguiensis
intro: Stelis panguiensis, also known as the Stelis species, is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its use as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, which has led to its application in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with Stelis panguiensis include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Stelis panguiensis are typically made by drying the plant material, then infusing it in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
